Paste Full Letter (auto-fill)

Best-effort parsing — always double check the fields below after, and fix anything it got wrong.

Date

To (Recipient Block)

Subject

Salutation

Body

Closing

The stamp + "Mehmood Hakimi, Founder & National President, Positive Change Foundation" block flows automatically right after these two lines.

Signature Block Position

Positions itself automatically below your closing lines. Use these sliders to nudge it left/right and up/down.
0 px
0 px
⚠️ The signature block is running close to the footer. Shorten the body text, reduce font size, or nudge it up.
Default font is Calibri, 12pt, on every field — change any of them per field as you like. Font rendering uses fonts installed on your device: Calibri & Cambria look best on Windows/Office devices; on phones or Macs they fall back automatically to the closest similar font. Times New Roman, Arial and Georgia look consistent on almost every device.
